g.text: not yet supported (v1 = azure-container-apps only); stop
[topology/security choice ambiguous OR a go-live landmine is statically detectable]
MANDATORY dialect confirmation — BEFORE any artifact (USE-DEPLOY-DIALECT)
resolve requested IaC dialect from the description
(Bicep | Terraform) — exactly one; NO silent default
runbook.md) is written until the dialect is
explicitly confirmed. Same blocking discipline as
the landmine pause; never a buried STOP note.
FULL PARITY regardless of dialect: Container Apps,
ACR, Azure DB for PostgreSQL (TLS), Key Vault
job. No store left more network-open than its
location, env/secret; STOP before every state-changing
or go-live step incl. the billing production gate)
for either dialect: Key-Vault-only secrets, App
gate, BYOK never touches the server, DB TLS +
report written files; review the diagram
and run the runbook yourself. Executes NOTHING.
